title: The Fundamentals of LLMs
subtitle: From everyday intuition to production systems
description: A production-minded field guide to large language models, spanning intuition, prompting, retrieval, evaluation, and safety.

title: LLM 的基本原理
subtitle: 從日常直覺到生產系統
description: 一本以生產實務為導向的大型語言模型指南，從下一個 token 預測與 transformer 出發，延伸到 prompting、檢索、評估、部署與安全。

title: Kubernetes and Istio from Zero
subtitle: A beginner-friendly deep dive into containers, clusters, and service mesh operations
description: A field guide for newcomers that starts with first principles and lands in modern production patterns across Kubernetes 1.36.1 and Istio 1.30.0.

title: 從零開始理解 Kubernetes 與 Istio
subtitle: 為初學者設計、深入探索容器、叢集與服務網格營運
description: 為新手準備的實戰導讀，從第一原理出發，落腳於 Kubernetes 1.36.1 與 Istio 1.30.0 的現代化生產模式。
